meaning: n.布丁的一种,揉好的面团,半腐烂的落叶堆,笨拙的人,顽固不讲理的人vt.<俚> 虚饰(商品)以欺骗人
examples: Duff said he would be demanding a rematch.
Duff soon mastered the skills of radio production.
One worked all summer and the other sat on his duff.
The UK MEP Andrew Duff spoke of "a critical year to save the EU".
Susan Duff, representing PC Stewart, urged the sheriff to throw out the case against him.
